data.title: Compu Dynamics donates $15,000 to Loudoun First Responders Foundation through 6th Annual Charity Golf Tournament.
data.description: A donation of $15,000 has been made by Compu Dynamics to the Loudoun First Responders Foundation (LFRF) during their 6th Annual Charity Golf Tournament held in Chantilly, Virginia.

data.title: Americans are opting for 'deep history' trips to Turkey and Egypt, with a 10+% rise, avoiding overcrowded Europe in 2026.
data.description: In Princeton, New Jersey, on December 11, 2025, a notable trend is developing among North American travelers preparing for their international vacations in 2026. One Nation Travel, a tour operator from Princeton focusing on the Eastern Mediterranean region, has observed a substantial rise in cultural tourism interest. The company has noted a double-digit increase in...

data.title: Energy Toolbase partners with Sungrow to launch energy storage solutions PowerStack 255CS & PowerTitan 2.0, empowering clean energy tech.
data.description: Stuart, Florida - Energy Toolbase (ETB) has recently disclosed a strategic collaboration with Sungrow, a prominent player in the clean energy sector, as of December 11, 2025. Through this partnership, they aim to offer a comprehensive energy storage solution to the market. This system, powered by Energy Toolbase's technology, will provide end-to-end energy storage capabilities. Sungrow's expertise in clean energy technologies is expected to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of the system. This collaboration signifies a significant advancement in the energy storage sector, promising new opportunities for industry growth and sustainability.

data.title: Gold Royalty Corp. closes US$103.5 million bought deal financing with 25,875,000 common shares sold at US$4.00 each.
data.description: A company based in Vancouver, Gold Royalty Corp. (NYSE American: GROY), recently completed a public offering of common shares. This offering, which included 25,875,000 common shares in total, with an additional 3,375,000 shares exercised through the over-allotment option, was priced at US$4.00 per share. The company raised a total of US$103.5 million in gross proceeds through this offering.

data.title: TraxStar launches SynQ platform allowing custom lab workflows design with minimal restrictions.
data.description: Yesterday in Walnut Creek, California, TraxStar, a prominent provider of laboratory management software for discrete manufacturing, unveiled SynQ. This advanced platform offers organizations the ability to create tailored resources and workflows without constraints. SynQ marks a significant step forward in the industry as it allows for customization with minimal limitations, promising to revolutionize manufacturing processes.

data.title: VitalTalk launches a new course to empower clinicians in communicating about substance use amidst the opioid epidemic.
data.description: A new training program called Conversations That Matter: Engaging Patients Around Pain and Substance Use has been released by VitalTalk, a prominent organization specializing in enhancing clinical communication. The program aims to equip clinicians with crucial skills to effectively engage patients on these topics. This launch was announced on December 11, 2025, by VitalTalk through a press release.

data.title: American Liver Foundation awards $1.1M in research grants for liver disease, impacting various award categories.
data.description: The American Liver Foundation (ALF) has revealed the winners of its 2025 research grants, including the Pilot, Liver Scholar, Postdoctoral, and Travel Awards. This year, a record-breaking $1.1 million has been allocated to support these groundbreaking projects. The recipients of these awards are poised to explore new possibilities in liver research, with the aim of advancing understanding and treatment of liver-related conditions. The announcement was made in Fairfield, N.J. on December 11, 2025.

data.title: Coinbase's SOL upgrade allows trading Solana tokens directly, expecting a 10% rebound, access to millions of assets.
data.description: Solana (SOL) is projected to experience a 10% increase following an announcement by Coinbase Global Inc. (COIN) that users can now trade all Solana-based tokens through a decentralized exchange interface within the Coinbase app. This update was disclosed during Solana's Breakpoint 2025 conference in Abu Dhabi. Coinbase introduced a new system allowing direct buying and selling of any asset issued on Solana via DEX rails, avoiding the need for official exchange listings. Coinbase's interface will be used for trades that are executed entirely on-chain. Andrew Allen, leading Coinbase's Solana initiatives, mentioned that users will have immediate access to "millions" of on-chain assets, and issuers with ample liquidity can tap into Coinbase's worldwide user base without undergoing listing procedures.

data.title: T-Mobile awards $20M in Hometown Grants to 450 communities across 48 states, giving up to $50,000 per town for local projects.
data.description: T-Mobile revealed the newest 25 beneficiaries of its Hometown Grants program, providing up to $50,000 per town for local initiatives. In the last four years, T-Mobile has allocated over $20 million in grants to 450 small towns and rural areas in 48 states and Puerto Rico. Launched in April 2021, the program has already made a significant impact by facilitating projects that enhance communities and livelihoods.

data.title: R360 founder Charlie Garcia launches D.C. Metro chapter for ultra-high-net-worth families requiring $100M net worth to join.
data.description: Charlie Garcia, the founder of R360, has been appointed as the chairman of a regional organization catering to ultra-high-net-worth families in Washington, D.C., Northern Virginia, Maryland, and the Potomac Region. To be eligible for membership in this exclusive network, individuals must possess a minimum net worth of $100 million. This development was announced on December 11, 2025.

data.title: DFW residents cautioned by Dr. Green Services on winter lawn damage from freeze/thaw cycles. Stress on turf due to temperature swings.
data.description: Experts in the Dallas-Fort Worth area are highlighting the impact of rapid freeze/thaw cycles on turf, emphasizing the importance of winter protection measures. The region is experiencing extreme temperature fluctuations, causing substantial strain on lawns. The experts stress the need for immediate action to safeguard turf during this winter season to prevent damage.

data.title: Workforce trends for 2026: Grind culture and demoralization risks, deskless workers on the rise.
data.description: In Boston on December 11, 2025, it was reported by meQuilibrium (meQ), the top workforce resilience expert globally, that employers will encounter notable threats to employee welfare unless issues like grind culture and demoralization are tackled. Conversely, there is optimism regarding deskless workers poised to take the lead in this.

data.title: botim partners with Jingle Pay to offer low-cost remittances to Pakistan. 1.7 million Pakistani residents in the UAE benefit.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on December 11, 2025, botim, the primary platform of Astra Tech and the initial AI-native fintech app in the UAE, revealed a significant collaboration with Jingle Pay, the top digital remittance platform in the UAE. This partnership aims to benefit 1.7 million Pakistani residents currently residing in the UAE.

data.title: Intersignal runs 1-trillion-parameter AI model locally, a milestone in offline intelligence. Major step forward in AI tech.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on December 11, 2025, the AI lab Intersignal revealed a significant advancement: they have managed to load and run a cognitive model with a staggering 1 trillion parameters on just one workstation. This accomplishment marks a major breakthrough for Intersignal, showcasing their cutting-edge capabilities in the field of artificial intelligence.

data.title: Dwight Kay releases book on 721 Exchange UPREITs, first of its kind, guiding investors on complex tax strategy.
data.description: Dwight Kay, a prominent figure in the real estate investment sector, has recently unveiled the debut publication that focuses entirely on the burgeoning 721 Exchange UPREIT. This groundbreaking book serves as a crucial guide for individuals looking to understand and leverage this intricate tax strategy. The unveiling took place in Los Angeles on December 11, 2025, marking a significant step in providing insights into this innovative approach.

data.title: Amazon AI architect Mukesh Jain, responsible for over $12B in commercial impact, leaves to build AI for construction at Kaya AI.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in San Francisco, Kaya AI, the platform offering predictive supply-chain intelligence for crucial construction projects, revealed that Mukesh Jain, the Amazon AI expert responsible for Rufus and over $12 billion in AI-related commercial success, has been recruited by the company.

data.title: GAP releases ByteInsight reports to address technical debt risks. Modernization division GAPVelocity AI offers new tools.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on December 11, 2025, Growth Acceleration Partners (GAP) introduced a new version of ByteInsight through its modernization arm, GAPVelocity AI. ByteInsight is a robust static code analysis tool aimed at aiding developers in comprehending their codebase and resolving technical issues.
